summary: Created 5-phase plan to set up tasks across both repos (cslib and BimodalLogic) for integrating sorry-free bimodal temporal logic into cslib via 10 modular PRs

artifacts.summary: Integration plan covering: BimodalLogic preparation tasks (291-294), cslib porting tasks (2-11) for 10 PRs, coordination task (12), proof-of-concept task (13), and cross-repo dependency validation
